summary: Comprehensive testing of Intensiti digital signage application completed. All backend APIs working (100% pass rate), frontend UI fully functional including new features: force refresh button, playlist duplication, WYSIWYG text editor (not reversed), 3-day weather forecast, RSS ticker from Le Monde. Both superadmin and client login flows verified.
passed_tests: Superadmin login (admin@intensiti.com / admin123) - 200 OK
Client login (demo@test.com / demo123) - 200 OK
Invalid credentials rejection - 401
Client dashboard shows correct stats (1 screen, 1 online, 0 media, 1 playlist)
Superadmin dashboard shows global stats (4 clients, 4 screens, 4 online, 5 playlists)
Screen list endpoint - 200 OK
Screen create and delete - 200 OK
Force refresh endpoint POST /api/screens/{id}/refresh - 200 OK
Force refresh button visible and clickable in UI
Playlist list endpoint - 200 OK
Playlist CRUD operations - 200 OK
Playlist duplicate endpoint POST /api/playlists/{id}/duplicate - 200 OK
Duplicate button (Copy icon) visible in Playlists UI
Display page /api/display/386621 - 200 OK with screen, settings, playlist data
Display page loads with header (time 13:26, date Mercredi 18 Mars 2026, weather 15°C Paris)
3-day weather forecast displayed (Jeu 17°, Ven 17°, Sam 10°) - GET /api/weather/forecast working
RSS endpoint GET /api/rss?url=https://www.lemonde.fr/rss/une.xml - returns 17 items
RSS ticker shows Le Monde headlines in footer
Settings page has 7 color pickers
Settings page has footer items management (add/remove/toggle/reorder)
Settings page has RSS URL input (set to lemonde.fr)
Settings page has logo upload button
Playlist editor shows 3 slides with drag handles visible
Edit slide dialog shows Duration, Transition, Layout, Fit mode dropdowns
Edit slide dialog shows Programmation (scheduling) with date pickers
Add slide dialog has 5 tabs: Media, YouTube, QR Code, Compte a rebours, Texte
WYSIWYG text editor types text correctly (NOT reversed) - verified 'Test texte francais' input
Weather API returns correct data for Paris
Ephemeris API returns saint du jour
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the requirements verified working: JWT auth (both roles), CRUD operations, Force refresh endpoint and button, Playlist duplication, WYSIWYG editor (contentEditable approach working correctly), Drag-and-drop slide reordering with visible handles, Per-slide settings (duration/transition/layout/fit mode), Scheduling date pickers, Weather widget with 3-day forecast, RSS feed ticker from Le Monde, Settings with 7 color pickers, footer items management. Display page code 386621 loads properly.
